topics.title: Aviation Safety and Recent Crashes
topics.summary: The studio discusses the dangers of unlicensed pilots flying in populated areas following a recent plane crash in Manhattan involving a professional athlete.

topics.title: Parenting Struggles and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a parent's difficulties with a child's school behavior, a prank call involving Steve Langford, the safety of small aircraft, and the production of Howard TV.

topics.title: Small Plane Crash Over Manhattan
topics.summary: The studio discusses the risks of hobbyist pilots flying over densely populated areas following a tragic crash involving a professional baseball player.

topics.title: Cory Lytle Plane Crash and Strike History
topics.summary: The show features a discussion with a sports writer about the tragic death of baseball player Cory Lytle in a plane crash, his history as a strike-breaking player, and the safety risks of private aviation.

topics.title: Football Pool Contest and Management Disputes
topics.summary: The studio hosts a football pool contest while engaging in heated exchanges with callers regarding management disputes, personal insults, and the consequences of appearing on the show.

topics.title: Bob Saget Discusses New Game Show
topics.summary: The studio features Bob Saget discussing the complexities of his new game show, his career choices regarding R-rated content, and personal details regarding his divorce and family.

topics.title: Hollywood Anecdotes and Celebrity Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion of personal dating experiences, behind-the-scenes stories from the set of Dirty Work, and interactions with various celebrities including Norm Macdonald and Don Rickles.

topics.title: Bob Saget Guest Appearance
topics.summary: The studio hosts Bob Saget as he discusses his upcoming game show, a comedy film about penguins, his personal life, and past experiences with substance use.

topics.title: Mel Gibson's Arrest and Antisemitic Remarks
topics.summary: The studio features a segment discussing actor Mel Gibson’s arrest for making antisemitic remarks while intoxicated, including his claims of being "overwrought" and the subsequent media coverage of his behavior.

topics.title: Andrew Dice Clay and Artie Lange Interaction
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation between Andrew Dice Clay and Artie Lange regarding their past professional conflicts, personal lives, and the dynamics of their collaborative performances.

topics.title: Artie Lange's Career and Touring Plans
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Artie Lange's upcoming tour, his professional relationship with other comedians, and the distinction between large-scale arena performances versus intimate club sets.

topics.title: Comedy Career and Business Strategy
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion between comedians regarding tour logistics, arena performances, and the management of new material for broadcast.

topics.title: Mel Gibson Interview and Corey Lidle Death
topics.summary: The studio reacts to Mel Gibson's controversial interview with Diane Sawyer and discusses the tragic death of New York Yankees pitcher Corey Lidle in a plane crash.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The show covers topics including Madonna's adoption of a child from Malawi, Michael Jackson's legal disputes with Debbie Rowe, and the political fallout surrounding Representative Mark Foley.

topics.title: News Segment Highlights
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including the treason charges against an Al-Qaeda propagandist, political and financial controversies involving Senator Harry Reid, reports on television show drama and celebrity news, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
